messages.subject: [RsR] get outlier list without plot
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

First time posting on the robust list. New to R.

How do I get the outliers list generated via uni.plot without opening a
graphics device?

Regards,

Ben

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
